description: The viral number-merging puzzle. Combine matching tiles recursively with arrow keys to reach the ultimate 2048 tile!
author: Gabriele Cirulli

title: Hextris
description: Fast-paced hexagonal puzzle game. Rotate the hexagon block grid to align colors and clear rows before tiles stack and overflow.
author: Hextris Team

title: Tower Building
description: Test your precision timing! Drop moving high-rise blocks perfectly on top of each other to erect the tallest, sturdiest skyscraper.
author: Clement Madiot

title: Retro Snake
description: Eat neon apples to grow your snake sequence while carefully avoiding crashing into walls or your own expanding tail segments.
author: Mczak

title: Floppy Bird
description: An addictive, high-difficulty flight simulator. Guide the feathered flyer safely through narrow setups of green pipelines.
author: Nebez

title: Reaction Impulse (Built-In)
description: A local high-performance visual speed tester. Slam the panel the exact millisecond the card flashes from amber to neon-green!
author: Arcade Studio

title: Retro Memory Grid (Built-In)
description: Train your neural receptors! Replicate the exact visual audio pattern sequence displayed on the layout matrix screen as it speeds up.
author: Arcade Studio
